headline: Apple Eyes Deeper AI Integration Across iPhone Lineup in 2024
summary: Apple is planning to integrate large language model capabilities directly into iOS 18, enabling on-device AI features without cloud dependency. The move positions Apple ahead of Samsung in the premium AI smartphone race.

headline: Tesla FSD v12 Rolls Out to All North America Customers
summary: Tesla began deploying Full Self-Driving version 12 to its entire North American fleet, marking a shift to end-to-end neural network architecture. Elon Musk called it 'the most significant release in Tesla's history'.

headline: US Treasury Yields Climb as Strong Jobs Data Tempers Rate Cut Hopes
summary: The 10-year Treasury yield rose to 4.18% after December non-farm payrolls came in at 216,000, well above the 170,000 consensus. The strong labor market gives the Fed cover to delay rate cuts, rattling bond markets.

headline: Hong Kong Regulator Approves First Spot Bitcoin ETFs in Asia
summary: Hong Kong's Securities and Futures Commission approved three spot Bitcoin ETFs, making Hong Kong the first Asian jurisdiction to offer direct crypto ETF exposure. The approval signals a bid to reclaim its position as Asia's leading financial hub.

headline: Nasdaq Composite Reaches New All-Time High Amid Tech Earnings Rally
summary: The Nasdaq Composite closed at a record 16,832, surpassing its previous 2021 peak, as investors piled into AI-related technology stocks ahead of a heavy earnings season. Semiconductor stocks led the advance.
